main.name: Alex Rivera
main.bio: My name is Alex. I'm a 24-year-old full-stack developer with a passion for building innovative web applications. I specialize in TypeScript, Python, and Rust, working with cutting-edge frameworks like Next.js, SvelteKit, and FastAPI. Currently pursuing my Master's in Computer Science at MIT. I'm also the lead developer at CyberForge Labs and an active contributor to open-source projects.

education.description: Specializing in Distributed Systems and Machine Learning
Graduated Summa Cum Laude with Honors in AI Research

projects.title: NeuroChat AI
projects.about: An advanced AI chatbot platform powered by GPT-4 and custom fine-tuned models. Features real-time streaming, context awareness, and multi-language support for enterprise-grade conversations.

projects.title: CloudSync Pro
projects.about: A real-time collaboration suite that syncs documents, code, and designs across teams. Built with WebSockets, operational transformation algorithms, and distributed systems architecture.

projects.title: CodeForge IDE
projects.about: A browser-based IDE with live collaboration, AI-powered code completion, and integrated deployment pipelines. Supports 20+ programming languages with extensible plugin system.

projects.title: FinanceFlow
projects.about: A comprehensive financial management platform for startups and freelancers. Features automated invoicing, expense tracking, tax calculations, and real-time analytics dashboards.

projects.title: SmartCommit VS Code Extension
projects.about: An intelligent Git assistant that analyzes code changes and generates contextual commit messages using Claude AI. Includes automatic branch naming and PR description generation.

projects.title: APIGuardian
projects.about: A security-focused API gateway with built-in rate limiting, authentication, request validation, and real-time threat detection. Protects microservices with zero-trust architecture.

testimonials.text: Alex's technical expertise and problem-solving abilities are outstanding. They transformed our entire infrastructure and reduced costs by 40%.
Working with Alex was a game-changer for our team. Their code quality and architectural decisions set new standards for our organization.
